title: Growth Gateway: Vietnam sustainability opportunities
body: "This slide deck was prepared by the Growth Gateway programme team in collaboration with the Boston Consulting Group. It aims to support stakeholders in understanding how Vietnam could unlock over £13.4 billion in GDP and create up to 1.5 million jobs by 2030 through targeted green investments in agriculture, energy, and industry, supported by a £168 million pipeline of sustainable projects.  The document analyses the potential effect of mitigation and resilience policy actions on Vietnam’s economy, prioritises sectors using an impact framework, models the socio-economic potential of projects, and offers recommendations on overcoming market barriers.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
